---
title: "About This Website"
---

Charlize Ezernack is a current senior at Wake Forest University in Winston-Salem. She is expected to graduate in May 2026 with a Bachelor degree in Psychology and a minor in Computer Science. Her research interests include exploring Traumatic Brain Injuries (TBIs), specifically how TBIs and generally other traumatic experiences influence changes in personality, life outcomes, etc. She hopes to further her career by working as a research assistant for 2 years before pursuing a Ph.D.
